name: Masala Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and milk in a saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Add cinnamon, cardamom pods, sugar, and coffee into the boiling liquid in the saucepan. Stir occasionally.
3. Continue cooking over medium heat for 3 to 4 minutes until the mixture thickens and becomes creamy.
4. Strain the coffee through cheesecloth into another pan.
5. Place the strained coffee back on the heat and bring to a boil once more.
6. Pour the coffee between two pans, ensuring it is smooth and creamy.
7. Serve immediately in cups.
